name: SHINOBI HIKEN: DACHI -YUUEN ZURU (SHINOBI SECRETS: STANCE -ELEGANT CRANE )

description.value:
In this stance, the user emulates the graceful movements of the crane, granting them a +2 to melee touch attacks to hit with Fuinjutsu techniques, Paper Bombs, Advanced Seals, and other similar objects. The user also gains a +1 dodge bonus to Defense against melee attacks.

TESSEN GEI HIJUTSU: ZANGANKEN (TESSEN ART SECRET TECHNIQUE: STONE CUTTER)

Taijutsu [Hijutsu]

Rank: 2, (C); Learn DC: 16, 2 successes; Perform: 5 (DC 15); Time: 1 swift action; Components: F, M, Mas, P; Range: Melee Attack; Target: Object; Duration: Instant; Save: None; Cost: 3.

This technique may only be used if the object is unattended or the object's user is charging or has lost their Dex bonus to AC. The technique allows the user to make a Sunder attempt as if they had the feat Improved Sunder, even if the prerequisites are not met. The technique also allows for the user to ignore 5 points of hardness. The tessen also deals slashing damage for this attack, non-slashing damage is treated normally (does not ignore hardness, effects objects as type).

Material Focus: A tessen of one size category below the user.

Mastery: Every odd step of mastery increases the hardness ignored by 5 and adds +2 damage to the attack.

At third step mastery, if attacking a reach weapon any square that could be reached or overshot by the reach weapon may be targeted.

At fifth step mastery, non-slashing damage ignores hardness and is not reduced by type.
